lessons.trigger: Summarizing framework documentation efficiently, ensuring relevant and concise output.
lessons.insight: When tasked with summarizing extensive framework documentation, prioritize leveraging official sources such as the documentation homepage or introduction sections. Use web search for discovery followed by targeted fetch to efficiently retrieve key data.
